_comment: Cameras the detector runs YOLO on. lat/lng/heading_deg/fov_deg MUST match src/data/mockCameras.ts. hls_url values come from src/data/realCameraStreams.ts. Detection depth is projected along detector/road_<id>.json when present. travel_bearing_deg is the actual traffic direction used for map arrows. Currently only ITICM_BMAMI0080, which looks inland/east down ถนนสาทรใต้ at oncoming westbound traffic. `lanes` describes the carriageway the ROI covers; lateral position is mapped across `count * lane_width_m` meters centered on the road corridor (+`centerline_offset_m`), and `invert` flips image left/right relative to the corridor's perpendicular.
